historical_preservation: Protocol, grader, outputs, grades, and study-report bytes remain unchanged. This additive adjudication does not rescore or relabel any attempt.

defect.public_task_disclosure: The public task disclosed four JSON keys, authority/supersession rules, and evidence-ID behavior, but did not disclose an allowed vocabulary for decision or action.
defect.grader_behavior: The frozen grader required exact equality to private decision/action strings for every form.
defect.calibration_failure: The pre-call alternative_valid cases varied only rationale wording while preserving the private exact decision/action strings, so the gate did not test semantically equivalent decision/action phrasing.
defect.consequence: All eight valid-environment attempts failed the exact decision criterion and all eight failed the exact action criterion despite using only the pinned authoritative evidence and producing semantically responsive actions. The zero pass rate is therefore not admissible as task performance, reliability, severity prevalence, or a selective-review-study prerequisite.

representative_semantic_alternatives.observed_action: Pause launch and reduce the configured pilot's error rate to at or below the disclosed 5% launch ceiling before reconsideration.
Revoke the active token immediately and rotate the credential.

admissible_observations.execution_service_availability: 8/8 under this exact execution window and configured system, descriptively only
admissible_observations.filesystem_and_input_integrity: 8/8 retained trials passed the frozen environment checks
admissible_observations.structured_artifact_production: 8/8 outputs parsed with the disclosed exact key set
admissible_observations.confidence_channel: insufficient_evidence for 8/8; no provider-emitted logprob/calibrated-confidence channel was present

continuation_gate: A new prospectively versioned matrix must either disclose controlled decision/action vocabularies or freeze a genuinely calibrated semantic-equivalence policy. Calibration must include at least two noncanonical valid paraphrases per decision/action field, plus near-neighbor wrong actions, before any model calls. Do not reuse these observed outputs as calibration or admission cases.
